_publications._publicationTitle: Neuroanatomical correlates of working memory performance in Neurofibromatosis 1.

_contextSnippet: Parent-rated Conners-3 rating scale indicated significant impairments with T-scores of 78 and 69 on the inattention and hyperactivity subscales respectively
details: Parent-rated Conners-3 rating scale indicated significant impairments with T-scores of 78.7 (SD 13.0) on inattention subscale and 69.1 (SD 18.2) on hyperactivity subscale
